name: Taverns/cp
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, brown the ground beef over medium heat until no longer pink. Drain any excess fat.
2. Transfer the browned ground beef and remaining ingredients (except hamburger rolls) to a crock-pot.
3. Cover the crock-pot and cook on LOW setting for 6 to 12 hours, or until tender.
4. Taste the meat sauce and adjust seasoning if needed before serving.
5. Serve spoonfuls of the meat sauce over toasted hamburger buns.
